title: Claim git-requirement error and documentation
description:
Make claim and lease commands fail clearly outside a git repo and document the requirement.

## Background

Claim and lease commands depend on `get_current_branch`, which already errors outside a git repo but with a generic message (commands/claim.rs:14-29). The project's CLAUDE.md states "git is optional", which does not flag the lease exception.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-17: a claim or lease command run outside a git repository emits an actionable error naming the git requirement, and the project guidance documents that leases require git.

## Notes

Touch commands/claim.rs for an actionable error that names the git requirement, and amend the "git is optional" guidance in CLAUDE.md with the lease exception. Self-contained.
